title: Earnings Preview: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline - Zacks
text: SolarEdge Q2 2024 Earnings Preview from Zacks. Market Context: Since the third quarter of 2023, SolarEdge started to witness slowing market demand for its products as its distributors began to experience financial challenges, and shipment volumes were expected to be lower than the prior-year quarter's level. U.S. Market: In the United States, the continuous slowdown in installations in California due to the rollover of net energy metering (NEM) 2.0 and continued slow growth in the uptake of NEM 3.0 was also likely to have plagued SEDG's revenues from the U.S. residential market. Cost Reduction Measures: In the first quarter of 2024, the company undertook significant cost reduction measures, including a reduction of 16% of its workforce, though significant restructuring expenses associated with contract manufacturer charges and equipment retirement costs, in addition to expenses related to manufacturing discontinuation in Mexico and reducing manufacturing levels in China, might have hurt its overall bottom line. Potential Bright Spots: Favorable revenue contributions were expected from the U.S. commercial market as well as the solar markets of Australia, Taiwan and Thailand. Schedule: SEDG was expected to release its Q2 results on August 7, 2024.
